records.text: Hotel carino, vicino alla metro e al centro di torremolinos. Ottima base per escursioni e la spiaggia si raggiunge sia con la navetta gratuita che con una bella passeggiata per le vie centrali. Ottimo buffet sia a colazione che a cena!
terrible!  water out of faucet was orange and the tub was clogged.
Terrible service.  Been waiting 45 minutes an still don't have brunch.
records.hotel: Embassy Suites By Hilton Houston Downtown

records.text: A la base sjour de 3 nuits avec 2 ados. Nous avons tellement apprci notre sjour que nous avons prolong d'une nuit.
Worst place ever! Bad service, worst shuttle service! The stay overall is horrible ;(

das Hotel lieget etwas auerhalb - sehr ruhig - sehr schn an einem kleinen See gelegen - tolles Frhstcksbuffet - gerumige Zimmer - gut ausgestattet - sehr hell - sehr sauber - das Bad sehr sauber und gut ausgestattet - groe offene Dusche
Luis was a terrible bell hop, he was rude, inconsiderate of our bags and dropped my laptop. Then when we didn't tip him for his inconsideration he dropped another one of our bags.
The pool is dirty and rust around doors and paint coming off ceiling
records.hotel: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Bay City

records.text: Hotel beds were hard & uncomfortable.  I heard every noise our neighbors made, from coughing to flushing. Horrible night of sleep!
hotel beds were hard & uncomfortable.  i heard every noise our neighbors made, from coughing to flushing. horrible night of sleep!
worst wifi i have ever used at a hotel. didn't work half the time.
records.hotel: La Quinta Inn and Suites Meridian

records.text: Very unhappy booked it as it said had a jacuzzi ,but got there and it was out of service not good at all room smelled
Possibly one of the worst hotels for shuttle service.  Had to wait for 50 mins to get picked up at the airport...
records.hotel: Wingate By Wyndham Chantilly / Dulles Airport

records.text: Way too expensive for being the save a lot of the marriott brand.
on the weekend park at city hall garage (on 10th facing the park) for a mere $5. it's 1/2 a block to save $20 (valet is $25 at the hotel).
The hotel is expensive. In addition, they add on 28 a day for parking.
It was terrible. Would never stayhere agian. So bad i didnt even go back for my 2nd night. Worst place i have ever staid at. Very nasty needs o be closed down
we ended up not staying due to it mean under construction the rooms were horrible looking I don't recommend anybody to stay
They seriously need to fix the elevators here. It is so damn slow it's annoying.
Noisy neighbors (TV, infant) through thin walls made the stay very annoying. location has no pedestrian way to cross the boulevard (to get to restaurants).

overnite trip to erie for shopping then splash lagoon the indoor pool was very dim lite and cold......like 70 degrees cold water IF that.......that was depressing since we booked it so the kids could swim at nite :(.

This Hotel is HORRIBLE. When we went to bed we pulled back the sheets and there was dried blood all over the sheets. We were so disgusted. We had to fight and fight for our money back and the manager didn't even care. Do NOT stay here.
cellphone coverage, especially verizon, is bad. don't take phone calls while inside!
The man behind the reception desk exemplified what customer service is all about.
records.hotel: Holiday Inn Express Hotel & Suites Emporia

records.text: They have a Saturday game shuttle for the UT home games, 20 per person.
Stayed one night to catch the Diamondbacks A's game. Within walking distance to Chase field.
records.hotel: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Phoenix Downtown - Ballpark

records.text: After a not great experience in Roma...the Westin in Venice was like being home.
walls are paper thin. the snoring man lady night may as well have been in our room.
Walls are paper thin. The snoring man lady night may as well have been in our room.
This hotel sucks!  No laundry, construction on the floor we're on, filthy old bathroom in the room and lousy service.
